self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve future Engine source adaptation quality by making the integration stage consume the typed extraction, adaptation, improvement, and proof boundaries produced earlier in the same planning pipeline.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case opens one bounded integration-stage chaining slice in engine/directive-engine.ts and the lane integration interface rather than a broad redesign of Runtime or host work.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, extraction fed adaptation, improvement consumed both earlier outputs, proof consumed all earlier stage output, and integration still consumed only planningInput.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The fourth chained seam will complete the progressive planning path without reopening Runtime, frontend, or host integration work.

decision.rationale: The prior DEEP slices and current Engine code justify one separate bounded implementation slice for integration-stage chaining.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
